economic_notes: Skwlax Holdings Inc. is a wholly owned subsidiary operating commercial enterprises including golf, spa, bar and restaurant, gas station. Band also has portfolio investments in All Nations Trust Company, Horseshoe Bay Developments Inc., and Squilax Investment.
notes: Skwlax Holdings Inc. consolidated with December 31, 2019 year-end figures. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $2,345,079 + Fisheries and Oceans Canada $50,221 + Province of BC $4,278,849 + CMHC $167,897 + Human Resources $0 = $6,842,046; however Province of BC likely includes some non-government amounts so used ISC+DFO+CMHC+BC+HRDC = $6,842,046 plus taxation $1,067,232 excluded from transfers giving $6,842,046 total government transfers. OSR includes taxation $1,067,232 + rental $481,963 + BC Gaming $318,788 + interest $260,153 + other income $4,601,689 + Skwlax $11,881,622. Budget showed significant deficit of $8,898,147 but actual surplus was $1,679,618. Chief and Council expenses were $429,738. No remuneration schedule visible in provided pages.
